---
title: "Time Series Analysis for MA3"
author: "Sky Yun"
---
# Library Imports 
```{r}
source("source/data_sources_and_dependencies.R")
```


# Time Series Exploratory Analysis
```{r}
plot(x=dataset$DATE, y=dataset$MSPUS, 
     ylab="Median US House Price", 
     xlab="Date", type="l")
```

**ACF and PACF plots of Differenced Series**
```{r}
# Predictions
diff_log_y = diff(log(dataset$MSPUS))
diff_y = diff(dataset$MSPUS)

y_scaled = data_scaled$MSPUS
diff_y_scaled = diff(y_scaled)

plot(diff_y, type="l", xlab="Time Index", ylab="diff scaled MHP")
```

```{r}
# Find best ARIMA model based on AIC
arima_best_fit = auto.arima(diff_y)
summary(arima_best_fit)
```

**Residual Checking**
```{r}
# Approximately Normal Residuals
# MA(3) Model
qqnorm(arima_best_fit$residuals, main="MA(3)")
qqline(arima_best_fit$residuals)
```
